name: refactor-htree-compensation-pipeline
title: Refactor H-tree compensation pipeline before final full-depth frontier pruning
description: Refactor src/operation/iCTS/source/flow/synthesis/htree so root-driver compensation is a high-cohesion scoring pass applied before final full-depth H-tree candidate frontier pruning, then compare release binary behavior against the pre-change baseline.
creator: dawnli
notes: Do not update .trellis/spec. Do not run ecc_dev_tools. No temporary instrumentation. Release binary comparison required against pre-change git HEAD baseline.
